title: Incarcerated individuals would receive new religious protections under a bill introduced Monday by Senator Dave Cortese (D-San Jose).
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Studies show that this form of religious exercise reduces violence and other negative behaviors in correctional facilities, and lowers recidivism.
The ability to practice one's faith is essential to the rehabilitation process.
